hero.headline: Supercharge Your Remote Team's Productivity with AI
hero.subheadline: FlowSync transforms how distributed teams collaborate, prioritize, and deliver results with intelligent project management.

features.title: AI Task Prioritization
features.description: Our advanced AI analyzes your team's workload and automatically prioritizes tasks based on project goals, team capacity, and individual strengths.

features.title: Real-Time Collaboration
features.description: Break down communication barriers with instant messaging, shared workspaces, and context-aware notifications that keep everyone aligned.

features.title: Automated Progress Reports
features.description: Get comprehensive insights without manual tracking. FlowSync generates detailed progress reports, highlighting achievements and potential bottlenecks.

problem_solution.problem: Remote teams struggle with communication gaps, unclear priorities, and inefficient workflows.
problem_solution.solution: FlowSync bridges these challenges by providing an intelligent platform that adapts to your team's unique dynamics and project requirements.

testimonial.quote: FlowSync has been a game-changer for our distributed engineering team. We've increased productivity by 40% and reduced communication overhead significantly.
testimonial.name: Sarah Chen
testimonial.title: CTO, TechInnovate Solutions

hero_image_prompt: A diverse remote team collaborating using FlowSync on laptops, tablets, and smartphones. Team members are in different locations like home offices, coffee shops, and co-working spaces. The scene should look modern, professional, and connected.
